進撃pf-medley20130629巨人 is the 11th and final track on the "Attack on Titan" Original Soundtrack II. It is also the 1st track on disc 2 of the "Attack on Titan" Season 2 Original Soundtrack.

As with all the other pre-The Final Season OSTs, it was composed and arranged by .

Title

pf – Piano/Pianoforte (Italian)

Musical motifs

The track is a medley of 4 motifs: 

0:00-1:11 立body機motion
1:11-2:42 Call your name
2:42-4:00 Bauklötze
